2605.04539.title: RLearner-LLM: Balancing Logical Grounding and Fluency in Large Language Models via Hybrid Direct Preference Optimization
2605.04539.paper_summary: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO), the efficient alternative to PPO-based RLHF, falls short on knowledge-intensive generation: standard preference signals from human annotators or LLM judges exhibit a systematic verbosity bias that rewards fluency over logical correctness. This blindspot leaves a logical alignment gap -- SFT models reach NLI entailment of only 0.05-0.22 despite producing fluent text. We propose RLearner-LLM with Hybrid-DPO: an automated preference pipeline that fuses a DeBERTa-v3 NLI signal with a verifier LLM score, removing human annotation while overcoming the "alignment tax" of single-signal optimization. Evaluated across five academic domains (Biology, Medicine, Law) with three base architectures (LLaMA-2-13B, Qwen3-8B, Gemma 4 E4B-it), RLearner-LLM yields up to 6x NLI improvement over SFT, with NLI gains in 11 of 15 cells and consistent answer-coverage gains. On Gemma 4 E4B-it (4.5B effective params), Hybrid-DPO lifts NLI in four of five domains (+11.9% to +2.4x) with faster inference across all five, scaling down to compact base models without losing the alignment-tax mitigation. Our Qwen3-8B RLearner-LLM wins 95% of pairwise comparisons against its own SFT baseline; GPT-4o-mini in turn wins 95% against our concise output -- alongside the 69% win the same judge gives a verbose SFT over our DPO model, this replicates verbosity bias on a frontier comparator and motivates logic-aware metrics (NLI, ACR) over LLM-as-a-judge for knowledge-intensive generation.
2605.04539.paper_summary_zh: 直接偏好優化（DPO），作為基於PPO的RLHF的高效替代方案，在知識密集型生成上表現不佳：來自人類標註者或LLM評審的標準偏好信號顯示出系統性的冗長偏見，獎勵流暢性而非邏輯正確性。這一盲點留下了邏輯對齊的空白——SFT模型在生成流暢文本的同時，NLI推斷僅達到0.05-0.22。我們提出了結合混合DPO的RLearner-LLM：一個自動化的偏好管道，將DeBERTa-v3 NLI信號與驗證者LLM分數融合，消除了人類標註，同時克服了單一信號優化的“對齊稅”。在五個學術領域（生物學、醫學、法律）中，使用三個基礎架構（LLaMA-2-13B、Qwen3-8B、Gemma 4 E4B-it）進行評估，RLearner-LLM在NLI上比SFT提高了最多6倍，在15個單元中的11個單元中獲得NLI增益，並且在答案覆蓋率上持續增長。在Gemma 4 E4B-it（4.5B有效參數）上，混合DPO在五個領域中的四個領域提高了NLI（+11.9%至+2.4倍），並在所有五個領域中實現了更快的推斷，縮小到緊湊的基礎模型而不失去對齊稅的緩解。我們的Qwen3-8B RLearner-LLM在與自身的SFT基準的成對比較中贏得了95%的勝率；而GPT-4o-mini則在我們的簡潔輸出中贏得了95%的勝率——再加上同一評審對我們的DPO模型的冗長SFT給予的69%勝率，這在前沿比較中重複了冗長偏見，並促使對邏輯感知指標（NLI、ACR）進行重視，而非將LLM作為知識密集型生成的評審。
2605.04539.author: Qiming Bao et.al.
2605.04539.authors: Qiming Bao, Juho Leinonen, Paul Denny, Michael J. Witbrock
